hero.title: Mastering a Profession – Key to the Future
hero.subtitle: At Vocational College
hero.description: Our college provides students with modern vocational education, hands-on skills, and a solid foundation to become competitive in the job market.

about.title: About Our College
about.description1: Our college is a hub of modern vocational education that fosters technical thinking and practical craftsmanship.
about.description2: We aim to unlock each student's professional potential, provide modern workshops and equipment, and build real-world work skills.
